question: Using 2017-2022 data, take the year with the highest gasoline/gasohol sales across U.S. states and build the school-year window from one year before through three years after. Among Texas counties that are top five by average summer meal program sites in that window, what is the highest average site count, rounded to the nearest integer? Return the rounded number in `Number` format. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Filtering fuel_type = "Gasoline/gasohol" and summing value by year (from date) for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 294719877886 in 2019.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the highest total gasoline/gasohol sales across U.S. states? (Filter fuel_type == "Gasoline/gasohol"; derive year from date; sum value by year and select the maximum.)

2.fact: In 2018-2019 (<node_1 answer> - 1 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1052), DALLAS (1014), HIDALGO (494), BEXAR (411), TARRANT (367).
2.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> - 1 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer - 1>-<node_1 answer (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

3.fact: In 2019-2020 (<node_1 answer> school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1919), DALLAS (1479), BEXAR (1038), TARRANT (688), HIDALGO (515).
3.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer>-<node_1 answer + 1 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

4.fact: In 2020-2021 (<node_1 answer> + 1 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (2674), DALLAS (1504), BEXAR (1168), TARRANT (1033), HIDALGO (700).
4.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> + 1 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer + 1>-<node_1 answer + 2 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

5.fact: In 2021-2022 (<node_1 answer> + 2 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1825), DALLAS (1545), BEXAR (814), TARRANT (757), HIDALGO (526).
5.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> + 2 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer + 2>-<node_1 answer + 3 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

6.fact: In 2022-2023 (<node_1 answer> + 3 school year), the Texas counties with the most summer meal program sites were: HARRIS (1016), DALLAS (688), BEXAR (364), HIDALGO (353), TARRANT (303).
6.subquestion: Which Texas counties had the most summer meal program sites in <node_1 answer> + 3 school year? (Filter: ProgramYear == '<node_1 answer + 3>-<node_1 answer + 4 (two digits)>'; count sites by SiteCounty; take top 5.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Year with highest gasoline/gasohol sales (2017-2022) -> 2019
Derived school year range: 2018-2019 through 2022-2023 (node_1 answer - 1 to node_1 answer + 3 school years)
AGGREGATION: Compute average across all 5 years -> Top 5 are {HARRIS: 1697.2, DALLAS: 1246.0, BEXAR: 759.0, TARRANT: 629.6, HIDALGO: 517.6}
Result: Highest average is Harris at 1697.2 -> rounded to 1697
